example_en: There is a concert on Saturday night.
The child proudly wrote a giant A on the board before continuing with the rest of the alphabet.
example_tr: Cocuk, tahtaya gururla kocaman bir A harfi yazdi ve ardindan alfabenin geri kalanina devam etti.

example_en: She studied all weekend and finally earned an A in chemistry.
example_tr: Tum hafta sonu calisti ve sonunda kimyadan A aldi.

example_en: After the test results came back, we learned that his blood group is A.
example_tr: Test sonuclari geldikten sonra kan grubunun A oldugunu ogrendik.

example_en: Asexual organisms can reproduce without sexual cells.
example_tr: Eseysiz organizmalar cinsel hucreler olmadan uretebilir.

example_en: Aah! Now I remember where I left my keys.
example_tr: Aa! Anahtarlarimi nerede unuttugumu simdi hatirladim.

example_en: An aardvark wandered across the dirt road just after sunset, its long snout close to the ground.
example_tr: Gun batimindan hemen sonra, uzun burnu yere yakin bir sekilde bir karincayiyen toprak yolda dolasiyordu.

example_en: Aargh! I can't believe I spilled coffee on my notes right before the meeting.
example_tr: Aaah! Toplantidan hemen once notlarimin uzerine kahve doktum.

example_en: She was taken aback when she ran into her old friend at the airport.
In ancient times, merchants used an abacus for quick calculations.
example_tr: Eski zamanlarda tuccarlar hizli hesaplamalar icin abakus kullanirlardi.

example_en: Her father abandoned Linda at the bus station when she was only eight.
example_tr: Babasi, Linda henuz sekiz yasindayken onu otobus terminalinde terk etti.

example_en: I am sorry I abandoned you like that.
example_tr: Seni oyle yuzustu biraktigim icin ozur dilerim.

example_en: The match was abandoned after heavy rain made the field unplayable.
example_tr: Siddetli yagmur nedeniyle saha oynanamaz hale gelince mac yarida kaldi.

example_en: Faced with the unrelenting storm at sea, the crew abandoned all hope.
example_tr: Denizdeki amansiz firtinayla karsi karsiya kalan murettebat tum umutlarini yitirdi.

example_en: The children ran across the meadow with abandon, shouting and chasing one another.
example_tr: Cocuklar cayirda ipini koparmiscasina kosuyor, bagiriyor ve birbirlerini kovaliyorlardi.

example_en: As the hull cracked and water surged in, the captain shouted for everyone to abandon ship immediately.
example_tr: Gemi govdesi catlayip iceri su dolunca, kaptan herkese derhal gemiyi terk etmelerini emretti.

translation: zoru gorunce kacmak, gemiyi terk etmek
example_en: Investors began to abandon ship as the company's revenue continued to plunge.
example_tr: Sirketin gelirleri dusmeye devam ederken yatirimcilar gemiyi terk etmeye basladi.

example_en: The villagers found an abandoned child near the edge of the forest.
example_tr: Koyluler ormanin kenarinda terk edilmis bir cocuk buldular.

example_en: Vines and moss covered the walls of the abandoned building.
example_tr: Metruk binanin duvarlarini sarmasiklar ve yosunlar kaplamisti.
